notes: Corrected from prior 76/89 by merging three agent51 single-task green verifies: headless-terminal, chess-best-move, install-windows-3.11.
B7 ov2 rerun did not prove task failures: six tasks failed at docker compose up with upstream docker.sock /version EOF before oracle/test injection; schemelike produced missing artifacts.
video-processing manual docker run on ov2 reached docker exec in about 0.219s, falsifying the slow container-ready injection-window hypothesis for that image.
Use docker-shim socket for rl-ov2; upstream docker.sock /version currently returns EOF while docker-shim.sock succeeds.

rows.notes: agent51 single-task fix/verify merged after audit challenge
r5d dataset patch resolved; strict summary clean_with_warnings
r5 deploy-loop patch applied and unit-tested; live endpoints still empty in tests.log.
